descriptors.e: Known for social entrepreneurship and philanthropy
Investor at Urban Golf and Athletic Brewing

factual_points: Founded Toms Shoes and engaged in social entrepreneurship
Honored with Harvard Next Generation Award in 2015
Named one of the 'Five Best Communicators' in 2013
Featured in media outlets like CNN and Vogue
